title: Final integration pass — brutalist consistency check, prefers-reduced-motion, polish
acceptance_criteria: Build succeeds: `npm run build` exits with 0
No broken imports across all files
LenisProvider import and usage still functional
Three.js particle system renders without errors
All components consistently use the brutalist color palette
No remaining border-radius, shadow, or glow tokens referenced anywhere in src/
No remaining cyan/blue accent colors referenced (--color-accent must be #E61919 red)
No remaining double-bezel class names or patterns
No remaining rounded-full, backdrop-blur, or shadow class names in JSX
prefers-reduced-motion support verified: all animation-duration set to 0.001ms
All section headers use ASCII bracket format `[ TITLE ]`
Nav shows `[ KRISH ]` with mono uppercase links
CRT scanline overlay visible on page background
All data arrays (PROJECTS, WRITEUPS, JOURNEY, STACK, SOCIALS) untouched
Responsive layout preserved at mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints
Run `npm run dev` and confirm no console errors
